task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web console.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Server Audit or Member Server configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Server Audit' tab or 'Member Servers' configuration page is open.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct target server name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'APP-SERVER-01' is typed into the server name or domain field in the add server dialog/page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the required audit categories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes or toggles for 'Logon Activity', 'Object Access', and 'Privilege Use' are checked or enabled for the new server.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully added or saved the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'APP-SERVER-01' is visible in the list of configured member servers, or a success message is displayed indicating the server was added.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to configure the server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and ADAudit Plus UI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine ADAudit Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches ManageEngine ADAudit Plus, not a text editor, mock interface, or generic form.

integrity.description: Verify the agent only added the requested server and did not modify unrelated settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: No other servers were deleted or modified, and global settings outside the scope of the task were not changed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target server to add: 'APP-SERVER-01'. Required audit categories: 'Logon Activity', 'Object Access', and 'Privilege Use'. Console URL: http://localhost:8081. Credentials: admin / Admin@2024.
